title: Kyiv: Missile strike
description: Update: Russian military official killed in car bombing outside Moscow, media reports. The victim of a car bombing outside Moscow has been identified as Damir Davydov, a Russian military official responsible for missile and artillery ammunition supplies, according to Russian investigative outlet The Insider.

title: Mariupol: Drone strike
description: Ukraine strikes ammo depot in Russia's Belgorod Oblast, confirms fuel tank destruction near Mariupol. In its latest update, the General Staff said Ukrainian forces struck an ammunition depot, command posts, drone control centers, logistics hubs, and troop concentrations across Russia and occupied Ukraine on June 8 and overnight into June 9.
description_en: Ukraine strikes ammo depot in Russia's Belgorod Oblast, confirms fuel tank destruction near Mariupol. In its latest update, the General Staff said Ukrainian forces struck an ammunition depot, command posts, drone control centers, logistics hubs, and troop concentrations across Russia and occupied Ukraine on June 8 and overnight into June 9.

title: Dnipro: Drone attack
description: Russian drone destroys Holy Dormition Church in Dnipropetrovsk Oblast The Holy Dormition Church caught fire in the settlement of Mezhova in the east of Dnipropetrovsk Oblast on 9 June as a result of a Russian attack. Read the full article on our website

title: Kherson: Drone strike
description: Chonhar Bridge struck in occupied Kherson Oblast as Ukraine steps up pressure on Russian logistics routes in Crimea. This is the second time in the past three days that the bridge has been closed, following an overnight strike on June 7 involving Ukrainian FP-2 and Behemot drones.
description_en: Chonhar Bridge struck in occupied Kherson Oblast as Ukraine steps up pressure on Russian logistics routes in Crimea. This is the second time in the past three days that the bridge has been closed, following an overnight strike on June 7 involving Ukrainian FP-2 and Behemot drones.

title: Sumy: Casualties reported
description: Man killed in Russian drone attack on Sumy Oblast A man was killed in a Russian drone attack on a residential area in the Putyvl hromada, Sumy Oblast, on 9 June. A hromada is an administrative unit designating a village, several villages, or a town, and their adjacent territories – ed. Read the full article on our website

title: 600 drones
description: "We will launch 600 drones and missiles all over Russia, and they will feel this war in the same way as we feel it," - Zelensky Bolota, repeat in syllables: BA - VO - VNA. This will be your word of the year.
description_en: "We will launch 600 drones and missiles all over Russia, and they will feel this war in the same way as we feel it," - Zelensky Bolota, repeat in syllables: BA - VO - VNA. This will be your word of the year.
description_uk: "Мы будем запускать по всей России по 600 дронов и ракет, и они почувствуют эту войну так же, как её чувствуем мы", - Зеленский Болота, повторяйте по слогам: БА - ВО - ВНА. Это будет ваше слово года.

title: Casualties reported
description: The ideal solution in peace negotiations is to urgently end the war. At least the first step to take is an unconditional complete ceasefire. This is important. Ceasefire is also a complex process. Yes, it is about political will and decision, but at the same time, today there are kill zones of 20, 30, 40 kilometers. If there are no guarantors and monitoring of the ceasefire, Russia can take advantage of this and advance by 20...
description_en: The ideal solution in peace negotiations is to urgently end the war. At least the first step to take is an unconditional complete ceasefire. This is important. Ceasefire is also a complex process. Yes, it is about political will and decision, but at the same time, today there are kill zones of 20, 30, 40 kilometers. If there are no guarantors and monitoring of the ceasefire, Russia can take advantage of this and advance by 20...
description_uk: Ідеальне рішення в мирних перемовинах – терміново закінчити війну. Хоча б перший крок зробити – безумовне повне припинення вогню. Це важливо. Припинення вогню – це також складний процес. Так, це про політичну волю і рішення, але разом з тим сьогодні є кілзони на 20, 30, 40 кілометрів. Якщо не буде гарантерів та моніторингу припинення вогню, Росія може скористатися цим і просунутись уперед на 20...

title: Kyiv: Artillery shelling
description: Syrskyi approves Rocket Forces and Artillery development plan through 2030. The newly approved strategy calls for gradually replacing aging Soviet-caliber artillery systems with domestically produced weapons while retaining some of the most advanced foreign-made systems currently in service, Oleksandr Syrskyi said.
description_en: Syrskyi approves Rocket Forces and Artillery development plan through 2030. The newly approved strategy calls for gradually replacing aging Soviet-caliber artillery systems with domestically produced weapons while retaining some of the most advanced foreign-made systems currently in service, Oleksandr Syrskyi said.
description_uk: Syrskyi approves Rocket Forces and Artillery development plan through 2030. The newly approved strategy calls for gradually replacing aging Soviet-caliber artillery systems with domestically produced weapons while retaining some of the most advanced foreign-made systems currently in service, Oleksandr Syrskyi said.

title: Kramatorsk: Evacuation ordered
description: Donetsk Oblast expands mandatory evacuation zone for families with children Authorities in Donetsk Oblast have expanded the zone of mandatory evacuation for families with children, ordering compulsory evacuations from specific streets in Sloviansk, Kramatorsk and the village of Bilenke, as well as from the entirety of Pryvillia and Malotaranivka. Read the full article on our website

title: Kyiv: Missile attack
description: Russia has modified Kalibr missiles used in attacks on Ukraine, Kyiv says – photos Russia has begun equipping Kalibr cruise missiles with cluster warheads and has reverted to using imported electronics after attempting to switch to domestic components, according to a Ukrainian Defence Ministry report based on an analysis of 3M14 Kalibr missiles downed by Ukrainian forces. Read the full article on...

title: Kyiv: Explosions reported
description: Car bombing outside Moscow reportedly kills man in Russian military housing district. The explosion occurred at around 5:30 a.m. local time while the vehicle was moving near an apartment building on Koldunova Street in Balashikha’s Aviatorov district, according to Russia’s Investigative Committee.
description_en: Car bombing outside Moscow reportedly kills man in Russian military housing district. The explosion occurred at around 5:30 a.m. local time while the vehicle was moving near an apartment building on Koldunova Street in Balashikha’s Aviatorov district, according to Russia’s Investigative Committee.

The explosion occurred at around 5:30 a.m. local time while the vehicle was moving near an apartment building on Koldunova Street in Balashikha’s Aviatorov district, according to Russia’s Investigative Committee.
